overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);"><div style="display: contents;">Perl is a versatile, high-level programming language widely used for text processing, system administration, and web development</div>. Below are examples ranging from a basic "Hello World" to more functional scripts.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 75.5625px;"><img id="img-aajCacTQM6jOkPIP29aW0Qo_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="YouTube" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">YouTube</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+2</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">1. Hello World<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">This is the simplest Perl script. It uses a "shebang" line to tell the system where the Perl interpreter is located.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div></div><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">perl</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">#!/usr/bin/perl</span><span>
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">use</span><span> strict;
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">use</span><span> warnings;

</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Print a simple message to the screen</span><span>
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Hello, World!\n"</span><span>;
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">use strict;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>and<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">use warnings;</code></strong>: These are "pragmas" that help catch common coding errors and are highly recommended for all Perl scripts.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Scalars (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">$</code>)</strong>: Store a single value (string or number).</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Arrays (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">@</code>)</strong>: Store an ordered list of values.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Hashes (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">%</code>)</strong>: Store key-value pairs.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">perl</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">my</span><span> $name = </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Alice"</span><span>;               </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Scalar string</span><span>
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">my</span><span> $age = </span><span style="color: rgb(250, 144, 62);">30</span><span>;                     </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Scalar number</span><span>
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">my</span><span> @colors = (</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"red"</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"blue"</span><span>);     </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Array</span><span>
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">my</span><span> %capitals = (                  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Hash (Associative Array)</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"France"</span><span> =&gt; </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Paris"</span><span>,
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Japan"</span><span>  =&gt; </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Tokyo"</span><span>
);

</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"$name is $age years old.\n"</span><span>;
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"The capital of France is $capitals{'France'}.\n"</span><span>;
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">3. font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">perl</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">my</span><span> $score = </span><span style="color: rgb(250, 144, 62);">85</span><span>;

</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">if</span><span> ($score &gt;= </span><span style="color: rgb(250, 144, 62);">90</span><span>) {
    </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Grade: A\n"</span><span>;
} elsif ($score &gt;= </span><span style="color: rgb(250, 144, 62);">80</span><span>) {
    </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Grade: B\n"</span><span>;
} </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">else</span><span> {
    </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Grade: C\n"</span><span>;
}
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">4. font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">perl</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">my</span><span> $text = </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog."</span><span>;

</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Case-insensitive search for 'fox'</span><span>
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">if</span><span> ($text =~ /fox/i) {
    </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Found the fox!\n"</span><span>;
}

</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Replace 'lazy' with 'sleepy'</span><span>
$text =~ s/lazy/sleepy/;
</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">print</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"$text\n"</span><span>;
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; Verify Current Installation<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">Before installing anything, check if Perl is already on your system by running:<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div></div><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>perl -v
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; Standard Installation (via APT)<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 20px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: decimal;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Update your package list</strong>:</span><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>sudo apt update
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: decimal;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Install Perl</strong>:</span><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>sudo apt install perl
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: decimal;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Optional: Install Documentation</strong>:<br>To access the local manual pages (e.g.,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">perldoc</code>), install the documentation package:</span><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>sudo apt install perl-doc
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 66.3984px;"><img id="img-_KjCafqGIrXakPIP7--d6AQ_3" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Veeam" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">3. Managing Perl Modules<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">While many common modules are available via Ubuntu's official repositories (e.g.,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">sudo apt install libdbd-mysql-perl</code>), you may eventually need<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">CPAN</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>to access the full library of Perl modules.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 86.5938px;"><img id="img-_KjCafqGIrXakPIP7--d6AQ_4" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Super User" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">Super User</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+1</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Install Build Tools</strong>: Required for compiling many modules from source.</span><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>sudo apt install build-essential
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Install Modules with CPAN</strong>:</span><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Enter the CPAN shell</span><span>
sudo cpan
</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Then run: install Module::Name</span><span>
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Recommended: cpanminus</strong>: A much faster and lighter tool for installing modules.</span><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">bash</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>sudo apt install cpanminus
</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;"># Use it like this:</span><span>
sudo cpanm Module::Name
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; color: var(--m3c11,#eef0ff); position: relative; font-weight: 400; --m3c9: #e6e8f0; --m3c11: #e6e8f0; display: flex;"><div style="width: 652.438px;"><div><div style="display: contents;"></div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; width: 652px; max-width: var(--CYi3c--fRcLaf,652px);"><div style="display: contents;"><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);"><div style="display: contents;">While Perl does not have a dedicated interactive shell like Python's IDLE or Ruby's IRB by default</div>, you can<span>&nbsp;</span><mark style="color: var(--jINu6c); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--jwFC2e); padding: 0px 2px; font-weight: 500;">use the built-in<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">debugger</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>as a highly effective<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">REPL</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(Read-Eval-Print Loop)</mark>.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 50.2109px;"><img id="img-XqrCae_IA9vMkPIPks4h_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Gist" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">Gist</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+1</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">1. Using the Built-in Debugger as a REPL<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">The most common way to get an interactive Perl prompt is by running the debugger on a "dummy" command.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 73.5078px;"><img id="img-XqrCae_IA9vMkPIPks4h_2" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="YouTube" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">YouTube</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+1</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Command</strong>:<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">perl -de 1</code><span>&nbsp;</span>(or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">perl -de 0</code>).</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Explanation</strong>: This tells Perl to run the debugger (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-d</code>) on the code snippet<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">1</code><span>&nbsp;</span>or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">0</code><span>&nbsp;</span>(<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-e</code>).</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Prompt</strong>: You will see a<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">DB&lt;1&gt;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>prompt where you can type Perl code directly.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Helpful Commands</strong>:</span><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">p $variable</code>: Prints the value of a variable.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">x $variable</code>: "Examines" a variable, providing a detailed view of its structure (especially useful for arrays and hashes).</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">q</code>: Quits the session.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 75.5625px;"><img id="img-XqrCae_IA9vMkPIPks4h_3" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="YouTube" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">2. Using CLI One-Liners<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-e</code></strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(execute) or<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-E</code></strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(execute with modern features enabled) flags to run code directly in the terminal.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Basic</strong>:<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">perl -e 'print "Hello world\n"'</code>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Modern</strong>:<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">perl -E 'say "Hello world"'</code><span>&nbsp;</span>(The<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-E</code><span>&nbsp;</span>flag enables the<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">say</code><span>&nbsp;</span>function, which adds its own newline).</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Process Files</strong>: Use<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-n</code><span>&nbsp;</span>to loop over input line-by-line or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">-p</code><span>&nbsp;</span>to loop and print each line automatically.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);"><div style="display: contents;">Perl is<span>&nbsp;</span></div><mark style="color: var(--jINu6c); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--jwFC2e); padding: 0px 2px; font-weight: 500;">a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">high-level, general-purpose, interpreted</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>programming language</mark>. It was originally designed by Larry Wall in 1987 as a Unix scripting language to make report processing and text manipulation easier.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 76.1016px;"><img id="img-qarCaY-NNon0kPIPs_276QE_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="YouTube" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">YouTube</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+4</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">Over the decades, it has earned several colorful nicknames, such as the<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">"Swiss Army chainsaw"</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>of scripting languages for its power and flexibility, and the<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">"duct tape of the Internet"</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>for its ubiquitous role in connecting different systems and handling data.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Key Characteristics<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Multi-Paradigm Support</strong>: Perl is highly versatile, supporting<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">procedural</strong>,<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">object-oriented</strong>, and<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">functional</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>programming styles.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Powerful Text Processing</strong>: It is renowned for its superior built-in regular expression engine, making it a top choice for parsing logs and complex text data.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Dynamic and Loosely Typed</strong>: Variables do not require explicit type declarations; Perl deduces the data type (string, number, etc.) based on the surrounding context.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Extensive Ecosystem (CPAN)</strong>: The<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://www.cpan.org/" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Comprehensive Perl Archive Network (CPAN)</a></span></span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span>is one of the world's oldest and largest repositories, offering over 25,000 reusable modules for almost any task imaginable.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Philosophy (TMTOWTDI)</strong>: Its core motto is<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">"There’s more than one way to do it,"</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>emphasizing programmer freedom and expressiveness over a single rigid coding style.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Web Development</strong>: Historically foundational for<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">CGI scripting</strong>; modern development uses frameworks like<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">Catalyst</span>,<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">Mojolicious</span>, and<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">Dancer</span>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Bioinformatics</strong>: Extensively used in genomics and biological data analysis, supported by the dedicated<span>&nbsp;</span><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://bioperl.org/" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">BioPerl</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>toolkit.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Data Integration ("Glue" Language)</strong>: Acts as a bridge to integrate otherwise incompatible systems by transforming data between different formats.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/AlDanial/cloc" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">cloc</a></span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(Count Lines of Code): The standard tool for counting blank lines, comment lines, and physical lines of source code in many programming languages.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">ack</span></strong>: A search tool designed specifically for programmers as a faster, more powerful alternative to<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">grep</code>. It understands source code structures and ignores version control directories like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">.git</code><span>&nbsp;</span>by default.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">ExifTool</span></strong>: A comprehensive, cross-platform library and CLI application for reading, writing, and editing meta information (EXIF, IPTC, XMP) in a wide variety of file types.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">inxi</span></strong>: A full-featured CLI system information tool used to display hardware, CPU, drivers, and desktop environment details. It is a standard tool in many Linux distributions.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">MySQLTuner</span></strong>: A high-performance script that analyzes a MySQL installation and provides recommendations for increased performance and stability.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">Perl::Critic</span></strong>: A static code analysis engine for Perl that enforces best practices based on Damian Conway's "Perl Best Practices".</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box;
